summary: Builds and returns a formatted Content-Disposition header value for a supplied resource name and optional disposition settings.
signature_intent: Accepts a resource name plus optional settings and produces a header-ready string.
behavior: Treats missing settings as empty settings.
Uses the provided disposition kind when supplied.
Defaults the disposition kind to attachment when none is supplied.
Builds header parameters from the resource name and any alternate naming setting.
edge_cases: Falsy settings are treated as absent.
Falsy disposition kind falls back to attachment.
Invalid resource names or settings may cause the underlying header construction to fail.
